/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO 70 OAKGROVE TODAY/X:AS A CONDITION OF BAIL, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ANDIS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORDAND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO ABIDE BY ANY STAYAWAY ORDER THAT WAS PREVIOUSLY FILED(8TH & MARKET STREETS)/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONT/DOP/X: CASE REMAINS IN LOVE WAIVER STATUS/

/CAL: CUSTODY STATUS/OR/X: THE COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION TO IMPOSE ADDITIONAL CONDITIONS OF RELEASE AFTER DEFENDANT CLEARS OTHER OUT OF CUSTODY WARRANT/X: PER THE PEOPLE'S REQUEST, THE COURT RECEIVED MEDICAL RECORDS FROMSF FIRE DEPT & SFMH/X: BOTH PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE CHANGE OF CUSTODY OFRECORDS/VD: PRELIMINARY HEARING OF 03-04-22/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCEON 03-04-022/DOP/X: CASE REMAINS IN LOVE WAIVER/
/CAL: CUSTODY STATUS AND BENCH WARRANT CONTEMPT DISPOSITION FOR 10-21-21 FAILURE TO APPEAR/X: THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS NOT IN CONTEMPT FOR 10-21-21 FAILURE TO APPEAR,/CONTD: CUSTODY STATUS/DOP/
